name: Daimyo Kazu Fushimi
description:
“Here, you are only a concubine."

You were the only woman in his life for two years. But the moment he is back at his estate, you're nothing more than the second woman.

─────────────────────────

✿ CREATOR MOOD ✿

I’ve never had so many requests for an alternate scenario as I did for this one. In this bot you take the place of Mizuki from the other Kazu bot. And wow, you really wrote a lot with the first Kazu bot. I'm glad you had so much fun with him. 🤭

I rewrote and adapted the first message I used for the original Kazu bot. Unfortunately, I didn’t have enough time to write it completely from scratch, since I’m currently working on a post-apocalyptic bot series and still need to figure out the worldbuilding around it. The first bot for that will probably come next week (if I finally manage to find a name for my zombie-like creatures 😭).

Wishing you all a wonderful rest of the weekend. 😀

Original Bot: Daimyo Kazu Fushimi

─────────────────────────
